Home / Services / Foundation Excavation

Foundation Excavation

Precision digging for stable foundations in Nashville's tricky soil.

Middle Tennessee's mix of expansive clay and shallow bedrock demands expert foundation prep. We excavate for:

New construction in The Gulch where urban fill requires soil stabilization. Our vibratory plate compactors achieve 95% density before concrete pours.

Historic home additions in 12South where original foundations lack footings. We underpin existing walls while digging new sections.

Luxury estates in Franklin where uneven settling cracks marble floors. Our laser-leveled pads stay within 1/8-inch tolerance.

We provide engineered soil reports for your architect and handle all Metro permitting. No shortcuts—just foundations that last generations.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Core sample testing at 4 corners of planned foundation
  2. 02 Step 2: Excavate to frost line (12" minimum in Davidson County)
  3. 03 Step 3: Install gravel base with geotextile fabric for drainage
  4. 04 Step 4: Verify elevation with transit before builder's inspection

Benefits

  • Prevents door/window misalignment from settling
  • Meets seismic codes for Middle Tennessee
  • Allows proper waterproofing membrane installation
  • Reduces long-term concrete repair costs

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you dig basements in Nashville's limestone areas?

Carefully. We use ground-penetrating radar to locate bedrock seams. In Green Hills, we often recommend walk-out designs instead of full basements.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with foundation excavation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-exc-r92
